https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/blueprint.name: blueprint
https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/blueprint.title: Blueprint | Indian Institute of Information Technology, Pune
paragraphs: Blueprint is the college’s graphic design and creative media club, bringing together students passionate about visual storytelling, branding, UI/UX, motion graphics, and digital creativity. The club serves as a collaborative space where members explore industry-standard design tools, develop creative thinking, and work on hands-on projects across multiple domains of design.

Through regular workshops, design meets, collaborative sessions, and competitions, Blueprint encourages students to learn, experiment, and grow as creators. From graphic design and illustration to video editing, animation, and 3D design, the club provides opportunities for members to gain practical exposure while building a strong creative community on campus.

Blueprint also represents the college in various design events and competitions, promoting innovation, teamwork, and artistic expression among students. With a focus on learning by doing, the club aims to nurture both technical skills and creative confidence in aspiring designers. Highlight in iConclave '26: Zokei Zokei was a poster-making competition organized by Blueprint as part of iconClave, aimed at encouraging creativity and visual storytelling among students. Participants designed posters based on a given theme, showcasing their skills in graphic design, composition, and digital creativity. The event provided a platform for students to explore innovative ideas, compete in a creative environment, and enhance their practical design experience.

https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/rang-0.name: rang-0
https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/rang-0.title: Rang | Indian Institute of Information Technology, Pune
paragraphs: RANG serves as a vibrant platform for students who perceive stories in colors, meaning in patterns, and emotion in every stroke. Rooted in creativity, collaboration, and innovation, the collective nurtures artistic talent while enriching the cultural and visual identity of the campus.
Through these initiatives, RANG plays a significant role in shaping the artistic atmosphere of IIIT Pune, ensuring that creativity remains an integral part of campus life.

Beyond workshops and events, RANG is a thriving community that values originality, teamwork, and artistic growth. Whether members are refining their techniques or discovering a new creative passion, the collective provides an environment of inspiration, encouragement, and collaboration.
The artworks showcased stand as a testament to the creativity, dedication, discipline, and artistic excellence that define RANG.
Explore the complete annual report showcasing the club’s activities, workshops, creative projects, events, artistic achievements, and contributions during the academic year 2025-26.
Club Head: Avani Patil
Club Co-Head: Akshad Khune
Email: rang@iiitp.ac.in
Instagram: @rangiiitp

https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/quantnum-cl.name: quantnum-club
https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/quantnum-cl.title: QuantNum Club | Indian Institute of Information Technology, Pune
paragraphs: Curious About the Magic Behind Numbers? Step into a realm where mathematics transcends numbers and formulas and becomes a journey of discovery!
At QuantNum, we believe that mathematics is more than equations and symbols; it is a powerful language, an intellectual adventure, and a work of art.
As the Mathematics Club of IIIT Pune, we are dedicated to illuminating the wonders of math, celebrating its timeless elegance and immense real-world value.
QuantNum is more than just a club; it’s a vibrant community for those passionate about exploring mathematics beyond the classroom walls.
We host engaging math seminars, interactive student-led and faculty-guided sessions, exciting problem-solving challenges, and fun mathematical events that inspire curiosity and analytical thinking.
Through these activities, we aim to make mathematics more accessible, collaborative, and relevant to real-world applications.
One of the club’s major highlights this year was Quant-Bid Arena, organized during iConclave ’26.
The event combined mathematics, logical reasoning, strategy, and competitive decision-making, creating a unique and engaging experience for participants.
The club also celebrates important occasions such as Pi Day and National Mathematics Day through engaging activities and interactive sessions.

QuantNum successfully organized Quant-Bid Arena during iConclave ’26, which witnessed excellent participation from students across multiple colleges and became one of the major highlights of the fest.
The club also conducted engaging seminars, problem-solving sessions, and mathematical activities to promote analytical and logical thinking among students.
Through Instagram initiatives like “Problem of the Week” and “Did You Know?” posts, the club encouraged mathematical curiosity and student engagement.
QuantNum aims to further expand its reach by organizing larger inter-college competitions, interactive workshops, speaker sessions, and innovative mathematical events.
The club also plans to strengthen collaborative learning initiatives and create more opportunities for students to explore practical applications of mathematics in technology and research.
At QuantNum, we encourage everyone to leverage their unique strengths.

https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/electic.name: electic
https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/electic.title: Electic | Indian Institute of Information Technology, Pune
paragraphs: A club of like-minded individuals who share a passion for literature and a perennial hunger for fun: that’s Eclectic!
We proudly call ourselves “The Bar Counter of Ecstatic Geeks”, and we leave no stone unturned in living up to that reputation.
At Eclectic, we organise writing activities, conduct open mics and literary quizzes, have book discussions, and much more.
However, it isn’t just the activities that define Eclectic — it is our vibrant and welcoming community.
Eclectic comprises a diverse group of students from different backgrounds who share a common love for language, literature, creativity, and self-expression.
The club encourages students to discover their voices, express their thoughts confidently, and continuously improve themselves through meaningful interaction and collaboration.
When it comes to trying new things, Eclectic never backs down.
One of our major initiatives was the launch of the podcast series “Yours, Clueless”, designed to bridge the gap between college life and the professional world.
Through one-on-one interactions between seniors and juniors, students gained valuable insights into careers, opportunities, challenges, and life beyond college.
In 2022, Eclectic organised ‘Eloquence’ with the theme: “What if you were a TEDx speaker?”
Former TEDx speakers were invited to evaluate participants and share their valuable insights, making the event an inspiring experience for everyone involved.
The club also conducted formal debate sessions during freshmen auditions for the batch of 2026, encouraging participants to think critically and communicate effectively.
New recruits brought fresh enthusiasm and energy, motivating members to organise engaging literary sessions and interactive activities.
A literary club would be incomplete without a dedicated space for readers.
Eclectic therefore founded its internal Book Society, where readers gather to explore new books, exchange reviews and perspectives, and engage in wholesome spoiler-free discussions.

https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/sports.name: sports
https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/sports.title: Sports | Indian Institute of Information Technology, Pune
paragraphs: Past Events:
The yearly report of the Sports Club for the academic year 2025–26-

Under the leadership of Shriraj Nilare (Head, Sports Club) and Bhavin Barad (Co-Head, Sports Club), the club remained committed to promoting fitness, teamwork, discipline, leadership, and sportsmanship among students by organizing a wide range of sporting and recreational activities throughout the year. Along with a highly dedicated and capable team of club members, the club worked consistently towards building a stronger sports culture within the institute while ensuring active student participation and engagement across all events.

Several planning sessions and coordination meetings were conducted by the club members before every major event to ensure smooth execution, proper management, and maximum student involvement. The events organized during the year not only encouraged competitive spirit but also helped students strengthen friendships, improve communication, and foster a strong sense of unity and belonging within the college community.
The Sports Club successfully conducted the following major events during the academic year:

Esports Tournament (23rd November 2025) The Sports Club organized an exciting Esports Tournament that brought together gaming enthusiasts from across different batches and departments of the institute. The tournament featured highly popular games such as FIFA, Valorant, Clash Royale, Fall Guys, and several other multiplayer competitive titles that attracted enthusiastic participation from students.

The event created a lively and energetic atmosphere on campus, with students gathering in large numbers not only to participate but also to cheer for their friends and teams. The intense matches, strategic gameplay, and competitive spirit made the tournament highly entertaining and memorable for everyone involved. Students displayed exceptional teamwork, quick decision-making abilities, communication skills, and coordination throughout the competition.

Beyond competition, the tournament acted as a platform for students to interact, bond, and build stronger connections with one another. Participants and spectators alike thoroughly enjoyed the event, making it one of the most engaging student activities of the semester. The Esports Tournament successfully highlighted the growing interest in digital gaming while promoting healthy competition, collaboration, and student unity.

Eklavya – Annual Sports Fest (27th–29th March 2026) Eklavya, the annual three-day sports fest organized by the Sports Club, was one of the biggest and most successful events conducted during the academic year. The event witnessed enthusiastic participation from students across all years and departments and transformed the campus into a vibrant and energetic sporting environment.

The fest included a wide variety of indoor and outdoor sports competitions such as football, cricket, volleyball, basketball, badminton, kabaddi, chess, carroms, and table tennis. Students participated with immense enthusiasm and dedication, displaying remarkable athletic ability, teamwork, determination, and sportsmanship throughout the competitions.

Across the three days, the campus was filled with excitement, cheering crowds, and moments of intense competition. Students gathered in large numbers to support their friends and teams, creating an atmosphere filled with energy, motivation, and unity. Every match and competition brought students together, strengthening friendships and encouraging interaction among participants from different batches and backgrounds.

Eklavya provided students with a much-needed opportunity to relax, enjoy, and engage in healthy recreational activities alongside academics. The event successfully promoted physical fitness, team coordination, leadership qualities, and mutual respect among students while also creating several memorable experiences for participants and spectators alike.
The event played a significant role in enhancing the overall campus spirit and fostering a strong sense of togetherness within the institute community.

Participation in Inter IIIT Sports Competition at IIITDM Kurnool Students from the institute actively participated in the Inter IIIT Sports Competition hosted at IIITDM Kurnool, proudly representing the college across multiple sporting events. The competition provided students with valuable exposure to high-level inter-college sports and allowed them to compete with talented participants from various IIITs across the country.

The participating students demonstrated dedication, discipline, determination, and excellent team spirit while representing the institute. The experience not only helped students improve their sporting skills but also gave them an opportunity to interact with athletes from different institutions, exchange experiences, and build new connections.

https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/rofies.name: rofies
https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/rofies.title: R.O.F.I.E.S. | Indian Institute of Information Technology, Pune
paragraphs: The club provides a collaborative platform for students to explore real-world engineering through hands-on workshops, interactive technical sessions, project development, and robotics competitions. Along with technical learning, ROFIES also promotes student collaboration, peer learning, teamwork, leadership, and practical problem-solving, helping members gain valuable exposure through interaction, project execution, and participation in technical activities.
One of the major highlights of the club was “Hashiriya – The Street Racers”, a robotics racing competition organized by ROFIES as part of iConclave 2026.

R.O.F.I.E.S. is also actively involved in innovation-driven and research-oriented development. The club’s project “Project Aura”, a mood-aware interactive robotic companion, successfully cleared the Level 1 screening of the international TRON 2026 contest.
The club has also successfully developed an autonomous drone system involving autonomous navigation, path planning, object detection, and a GUI-based monitoring interface.

With a strong focus on practical learning, innovation, teamwork, and technical excellence, ROFIES continues to create opportunities for students to explore advanced technologies and build impactful projects.

https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/q-riocity.name: q-riocity
https://www.iiitp.ac.in/page/q-riocity.title: Q-riocity | Indian Institute of Information Technology, Pune
paragraphs: The club brings together students who enjoy exploring the world through quizzes, discussions, games, and interactive activities across a wide range of topics including history, geography, current affairs, global culture, pop-culture, sports, literature, cinema, anime, defence, science, technology, space, languages, flags, maps, internet culture, and more.
Q-Riocity is more than a quiz club. It is a close-knit community where students can learn, host, participate, and have fun with any topic they are passionate about.

Whether someone is interested in world history, sports trivia, mythology, military vehicles, cinema, anime, memes, geography, linguistics, technology, or obscure science facts, Q-Riocity gives them a platform to explore and share that curiosity.
At the beginning of the academic session, Q-Riocity organizes a Freshers Quiz to introduce first-year students to the quizzing culture of IIIT Pune.

Q-Riocity regularly conducts quiz sessions across a wide variety of themes including anime, sports, geography, science, technology, arts, literature, pop culture, history, cinema, and current affairs.
The club also conducts interactive learning-based games such as GeoGuessr sessions, Skribbl sessions, Wikipedia Racing, Family-Feud inspired activities, and other creative quiz formats.
Regular club meets are conducted for planning, brainstorming, and coordination including quiz themes, question framing, round design, recruitment, onboarding, and internal coordination.
Cognition: Seikai Showdown was one of the major quiz events conducted by Q-Riocity during the academic year.
The event included multiple-choice rounds, visual identification, map-based clues, buzzer rounds, common-link questions, country silhouette identification, and language recognition formats.
Sakura Survey was a Family Feud-style interactive event organized by Q-Riocity where participants guessed the most common responses given by students.
Q-Riocity believes that learning becomes more meaningful when it is shared.
The club provides a welcoming environment where students can bring their own interests, learn from others, and participate without needing to be experts.
For participation, collaboration, or club-related queries, students may contact Q-Riocity through:
Email: q_riocity@iiitp.ac.in
